project_type: Native macOS SwiftUI desktop app (executable target)
build_system: Swift Package Manager (Package.swift). Single executable target 'KiroKantoku' with ACPModel/ACP dependencies from swift-sdk. All view files are gated with #if os(macOS). Linux builds compile a stub main().
test_framework: XCTest via swift test. Tests in Tests/KiroKantokuTests/ covering models, services, and protocol parsing.
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'swift build' from the project root and confirm it succeeds. 2. Run 'swift test' and confirm all tests pass. 3. Verify no new warnings introduced.
environment_constraints: Swift 6.2.1 available on host. OPEN_INTERNET network mode. This is a macOS GUI app but the sandbox is Linux, so we can only build (not run). SwiftUI views are gated with #if os(macOS). The build compiles all views through the Swift compiler even on Linux when targeting macOS platform, because Package.swift specifies platforms: [.macOS(.v14)].
contribution_requirements: Open an issue first. MIT license.
key_patterns: DesignConstants.swift centralized design tokens (corner radii, spacing, font sizes, colors). Views use Color(nsColor: .controlBackgroundColor), Color(nsColor: .textBackgroundColor), Color(nsColor: .separatorColor) for system integration. Buttons use .buttonStyle(.plain/.bordered/.borderedProminent), .controlSize(.small/.regular/.large). Most views use VStack/HStack with explicit padding and spacing. Collapsible sections use Button + withAnimation pattern. Cards use RoundedRectangle backgrounds with .shadow and .overlay stroke. Chat messages use bubble style with RoundedRectangle(cornerRadius: 16). Code panel uses segmented picker tabs. Forms use .formStyle(.grouped).
directory_structure: Sources/KiroKantoku/ - App/ (entry point), Models/ (data models), Services/ (agent manager, task manager, ACP, git, etc.), Views/ (Agent/, Code/, Dashboard/, Task/, Sidebar/, Session/, Settings/, Workspace/, Components/, Onboarding/). Tests/KiroKantokuTests/ has 6 test files.
